questions.text:
Join these ideas into one short and one long sentence:

  • I was very tired after school.
  • I went to my English class in the evening.
  • I tried to listen carefully and take notes.

Join these ideas into one short and one long sentence:

  • I felt quite nervous before the exam.
  • I had an important English test.
  • I managed to answer most of the questions.

Join these ideas into one short and one long sentence:

  • I needed a quiet place to study.
  • I went to the school library after class.
  • I was able to finish all my homework.

Join these ideas into one short and one long sentence:

  • I don’t really enjoy working in groups.
  • I join group activities in class.
  • I often learn useful ideas from other students.

Join these ideas into one short and one long sentence:

  • My school is quite far from my house.
  • I usually wake up very early in the morning.
  • I sometimes feel tired during lessons.
